name: Mexican Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Make batter by mixing together the cornmeal, eggs, baking soda, drippings, milk, and salt.
2. Mix well.
3. Brown meat and drain off grease.
4. Grease a 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
5. Add half the batter, then sprinkle on the meat, onions, peppers, and cheese.
6. Cover with remaining batter.
7. Cook at 350 degrees F for about 45 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
